case_title: LUIS AGUILAR VS. ANGEL OSCAR MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, ANGEL OSCAR AN INDIVIDUAL DBA JANITZI RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, ANGEL OSCAR AN INDIVIDUAL DBA JANITZI RESTAURANT $4,134.97 PRINCIPAL, $14.71 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,354.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
